name: disable-rdp-warnings
title: Disable RDP Warnings for Unsigned Files
description: Suppresses Windows security warnings when opening unsigned Remote Desktop (.rdp) files.
modal: This disables Microsoft's new RDP file security warnings introduced in April 2026. Unsigned RDP files from unknown publishers will connect without warning. Only disable if you understand the security risks.
warning: RDP files have been abused in attacks, it is strongly recommended to keep these protections enabled..

links.name: Microsoft adds Windows protections for malicious Remote Desktop files
